name: Forge
description: Our internal CRM / PSA — where a customer's raw idea is forged into shipped software. Tracks the full lifecycle: Accounts and Contacts, Deals through the pipeline, every Interaction (meetings, calls, chat sessions, voice notes, documents), and the BRDs + granular Requirements that become the build spec. Each BRD links back to its source chat session and forward to the project-manager Initiative and the app we deliver — a living thread from first hello to delivered product.
